name: URL Fetcher
author: itz-mune
description: Fetch and extract clean readable text from any webpage.
long_description: Adds a `fetch_url` tool that downloads a webpage and extracts its main readable content using Trafilatura — removing ads, navigation, and boilerplate.

config_fields.label: Max characters
config_fields.help: Maximum characters of extracted text to return (default: 8000).
